title: Oscars 2026 Winners: The Full List
text: Paul Thomas Anderson won Best Director for "One Battle After Another," marking his first-ever Oscar win in this category. The film, distributed by Warner Bros., represented a significant achievement for the acclaimed filmmaker. "One Battle After Another" dominated the ceremony, securing six total Oscars including Best Picture. Beyond directing, Anderson also earned recognition for Best Adapted Screenplay, demonstrating the film's broad critical acclaim across multiple technical and creative categories. The evening also saw "Sinners" claim four awards, with Michael B. Jordan winning Best Actor. "Frankenstein" secured three Oscars in technical categories. Notably, this year introduced a new Best Casting category, with Cassandra Kulukundis winning for "One Battle After Another." The 98th Academy Awards ceremony took place at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, hosted by Conan O'Brien for the second consecutive year.
